message:
test(embed): add EmbedderStack and DimReduceEmbedder tests, improve download cleanup logging

auto_detect: Add 88 lines of new tests covering EmbedderStack selection
logic and DimReduceEmbedder dimension reduction behavior, ensuring the
auto-detection pipeline correctly routes queries through the configured
model hierarchy.

model_download: Add tracing::warn for temp file cleanup failures during
model download so partial downloads don't silently leave debris on disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
